data.headline: Portfolio +0.34% (vs SPY +0.30%) — NVDA Long Position Outperforming
data.summary: Portfolio equity stands at $1,003,362.17, delivering a return of 0.34% against the SPY benchmark return of 0.30%, generating 3.62 basis points of alpha. The portfolio holds a concentrated long position of 354 shares of NVDA (market value $36,285, unrealized gain of $158.95), supplemented by realized gains of $3,207.22. Eight trading decisions were executed throughout the period. Cash position is $967,077.17.
data.risk_note: Portfolio carries significant concentration risk with 100% of holdings in a single equity (NVDA). No diversification across sectors or asset classes. Unrealized gains remain modest relative to realized gains, indicating position may still be establishing. Monitor liquidity in cash reserve and rebalancing triggers.
